samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Saute onion and garlic in butter until translucent
Add ginger and cook for 1 minute
Add tomato sauce and garam masala and stir well
Add cumin and chili powder
Stir constantly and bring to a boil
Cover and simmer for 15 minutes
Add cream and cook until sauce is reduced
Season to taste with salt and pepper
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in butter until translucent
2. Add ginger and cook for 1 minute
3. Add tomato sauce and garam masala and stir well
4. Add cumin and chili powder
5. Stir constantly and bring to a boil
6. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes
7. Add cream and cook until sauce is reduced
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Saute onions and garlic in butter until soft
Add ginger and cook until fragrant
Add tomato sauce, garam masala, cumin, chili powder and
salt

Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes
Add cream and simmer until heated through

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Melt butter in a large skillet
Add onion,garlic and ginger and saute until translucent
Add tomato sauce, garam masala, cumin, and chili powder
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes
Add cream and simmer for 5 minutes
Garnish with cilantro

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: In chicken pan, pan fry onion and butter
Add garlic, ginger and salt
Cook for 10 minutes over medium heat
Add chicken chicken and spices
Cook for 15 minutes
Remove chicken
In a blender add cream sauce, cream and cilantro
Blend till smooth
Add to serving bowls. <

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: In chicken place in saute pan melt butter and add onions, garlic and ginger, cook until soft
Add chicken and spices, stir, and add more butter if needed
Add tomato cream, simmer for 5 minutes
Remove on heat
Add, stir until well incorporated
Serve over rice

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Heat a pan pan and butter and saute the onion and garlic and ginger for 1 minute
Add the chicken and stir them for 2
Add the chicken and cook for 3 more minutes
Add the tomato sauce and cook for 3 minutes
Add the cream and cook for a further 2 minutes
Add the spices and fry for 1 minute
Add the chicken and cook for 2 minutes. . Serve with with steamed rice
